B2B Pitch - Source Document

Complete source document for the HeyZack B2B investor pitch deck

HeyZack B2B Pitch Deck Source Document

Deck Metadata

  • Purpose: Investor/Partner Pitch
  • Audience: VCs, Property Management Executives, Strategic Partners
  • Target Slides: 12
  • Tone: Professional, data-driven, confident
  • Generated: 2026-01-25

Brand Styling

Colors

RoleHexUsage
Primary Blue#243984Headlines, key data, trust elements
Primary Pink#E82F89CTAs, accents, energy moments
Black#2E2D2CBody text, supporting copy
Grey#E9EDEFBackgrounds, cards, dividers
Gradient#243984 → #E82F89Hero moments, title slides, CTAs

Typography

  • Headlines: Modern sans-serif (Inter/Poppins) — Bold, 48-64px
  • Body: Clean sans-serif — Regular, 18-24px
  • Data/Stats: Extra bold numbers, 72-120px for impact

Visual Direction

  • Photography: Clean tech product shots, modern buildings, professional property managers
  • Icons: Outline style, 2px stroke, brand colors
  • Charts: Minimal, brand-colored, large data points
  • Layout: Generous whitespace, asymmetric grids, premium feel

Content by Slide

Slide 1: Title

Headline: HeyZack Subhead: AI Automation for Residential & Commercial Buildings Visual: Logo centered on gradient background (#243984 → #E82F89), subtle grid pattern Tagline: “The Future of Building Intelligence” Speaker Notes: Open with confidence. This is about transforming a $180B industry.

Slide 2: The Problem

Headline: Building Automation is Broken Body: Property managers and building owners face an impossible choice: pay $85,000+ per building for enterprise BMS systems with vendor lock-in, or cobble together consumer devices that don’t scale.

Key Stats:

  • $85K — Average traditional BMS installation cost
  • 7+ apps — Typical fragmented smart building setup
  • $15K/year — Average maintenance contract fees
  • 40% — Buildings with no automation at all

Visual: Split screen showing frustrated property manager vs. complex wiring/vendor bills Speaker Notes: Make them feel the pain. This is the reality for every property manager in the room.

Slide 3: Market Opportunity

Headline: A $180B Market Ready for Disruption Body: The building automation market is massive and growing—but dominated by legacy players with outdated business models.

Market Size:

  • TAM: $180B — Global building automation market (2026)
  • SAM: $45B — Commercial property management segment
  • SOM: $4.5B — Mid-market properties (10-100 buildings) in US/EU

Growth: 12% CAGR through 2030

Visual: Concentric circles with market sizes, growth arrow Speaker Notes: This isn’t a niche—it’s a massive market with no modern solution.

Slide 4: Our Solution

Headline: AI-Powered Automation at 95% Lower Cost Body: HeyZack is the first building automation platform that delivers enterprise performance at consumer prices—with genuine AI learning, not just scheduling.

Value Props:

  • $5K per building vs. $85K traditional (95% cost reduction)
  • One dashboard for unlimited properties
  • Genuine AI that learns occupancy patterns and optimizes automatically
  • DIY installation — no electricians, no contractors, no service contracts

Visual: Product ecosystem hero shot with gradient glow Speaker Notes: This is the “aha” moment. Show them what’s possible.

Slide 5: How It Works

Headline: Simple. Scalable. Intelligent. Process:

  1. Deploy — DIY installation in 2-4 hours per building (not weeks)
  2. Connect — One app controls all 128 device types across unlimited properties
  3. Learn — AI observes patterns for 2-4 weeks, begins optimizing automatically
  4. Save — 20-30% energy reduction with real-time ROI tracking

Visual: Horizontal flow diagram with numbered steps and icons Speaker Notes: Emphasize speed to value. Traditional BMS takes 3-6 months to deploy.

Slide 6: Product Ecosystem

Headline: 128 Products. 15 Categories. Complete Control. Categories:

CategoryProductsKey Capability
Climate Control14HVAC, thermostats, radiator valves
Security19Cameras, doorbells, door locks
Energy Management12Breakers, switches, monitoring
Lighting18Dimmers, LED drivers, RGB control
Access Control13Smart locks, lock bodies
Sensors13Motion, door/window, environmental
Curtains/Shades29Motors, track systems, controllers
Gateways4Zigbee, WiFi, Matter hubs

Visual: Category grid with product icons Speaker Notes: Breadth matters. One vendor for everything = operational simplicity.

Slide 7: Competitive Advantage

Headline: Why HeyZack Wins Differentiators:

DimensionTraditional BMSConsumer Smart HomeHeyZack
Cost/Building$85,000$2,000$5,000
Portfolio Scale✓ Limited✗ None✓ Unlimited
AI Learning✗ Rule-based✗ Rule-based✓ Genuine AI
DIY Install✗ No✓ Yes✓ Yes
Vendor Lock-in✓ High✓ Medium✗ None
Energy Savings10-15%5-10%20-30%

Visual: Comparison matrix with HeyZack column highlighted Speaker Notes: We’re not competing with one category—we’re creating a new one.

Slide 8: Traction & Validation

Headline: Proven Results Metrics:

  • 128 products launched across 15 categories
  • 16 languages supported (global-ready)
  • 20-30% verified energy savings in deployments
  • 95% cost reduction vs. traditional BMS
  • 30 min average device setup time

Case Study Highlight:

“Deployed across 30 apartment buildings in 6 weeks. Energy costs down 28% in first quarter. ROI achieved in 4 months.” — Property Management Executive

Visual: Large metrics with customer logo grid Speaker Notes: Real numbers, real customers, real results.

Slide 9: Business Model

Headline: Hardware + SaaS + Services Model:

Revenue StreamDescriptionMargin
Hardware Sales128 device SKUs at 40-60% margin50% avg
Cloud ServicesOptional storage, analytics, API access80%
Enterprise SupportSLA guarantees, dedicated success70%
Partner ProgramInstaller certification, revenue share60%

Unit Economics:

  • Average building deployment: $5,000
  • Customer LTV: $15,000 (3-year)
  • CAC: $800 (B2B direct sales)
  • LTV:CAC ratio: 18.75x

Visual: Revenue stream icons with margin bars Speaker Notes: Multiple revenue streams, strong unit economics, clear path to profitability.

Slide 10: Go-to-Market Strategy

Headline: Land, Expand, Dominate Strategy:

Phase 1: Land (Year 1)

  • Target: Mid-market property managers (10-50 buildings)
  • Channel: Direct sales + industry conferences
  • Goal: 500 buildings deployed

Phase 2: Expand (Year 2-3)

  • Upsell existing customers to full ecosystem
  • Launch partner installer program
  • Enter hospitality vertical aggressively
  • Goal: 5,000 buildings, $25M ARR

Phase 3: Dominate (Year 4+)

  • Enterprise accounts (100+ buildings)
  • International expansion (EU, Middle East, APAC)
  • Platform partnerships (PMS, BMS integrations)
  • Goal: Market leadership in mid-market segment

Visual: Timeline with phase markers and growth curve Speaker Notes: Clear, executable plan with defined milestones.

Slide 11: The Team

Headline: Built by Industry Veterans Team:

  • [CEO Name], CEO — 15 years in PropTech, previously [Company]
  • [CTO Name], CTO — Former [Big Tech], AI/ML expertise
  • [COO Name], COO — Scaled [Company] from $5M to $80M
  • [VP Sales], VP Sales — Built enterprise sales at [Company]

Advisors:

  • [Advisor 1] — Former CEO, [Major BMS Company]
  • [Advisor 2] — Partner, [Top VC Firm]

Visual: Professional headshots in grid, company logos below Speaker Notes: Experience matters. We’ve done this before.

Slide 12: The Ask

Headline: Join Us in Transforming Building Automation Ask: $15M Series A to accelerate product development, scale sales, and capture market leadership.

Use of Funds:

  • 40% — Product & Engineering (AI capabilities, new device categories)
  • 35% — Sales & Marketing (direct sales team, brand awareness)
  • 15% — Operations (supply chain, support infrastructure)
  • 10% — G&A (team expansion, compliance)

Contact:

  • Email: invest@heyzack.ai
  • Website: heyzack.ai/investors
  • Calendar: calendly.com/heyzack-founders

Visual: Logo lockup with gradient background, contact info prominent Speaker Notes: Clear ask, clear use of funds. Make it easy to say yes.
